Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Who we are

Glovo is part of the Delivery Hero Group, the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience—fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide. Headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index.




Job Description




Your work-life opportunity:

Within the Brands Ads department in Glovo, we are building the present and future of retail media in +20 markets and we are seeking someone with experience in both advertising and making things happen. We collaborate with +100 brands ads sales colleagues in developing local advertising strategies, and you will play a major role in making their lives easier by providing a strategic vision on the media landscape fueled by data.




We are looking for a Sr Data Analyst . for the Brand Ads department who can drive and execute our data roadmap. In this role, you will champion various initiatives that support our primary strategy, working in tandem with business stakeholders from both local and HQ teams.




Key Responsibilities:

Data Pipelines & Semantic Modeling: Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipelines and dimensional data models. You will translate complex business logic into intuitive, highly performant dashboards (e.g., Looker) for commercial stakeholders.
Off-App Audience Engineering: Build and optimize automated audience generation engines using first- party data. You will develop API integrations that feed complex user segments directly into global Ad-buying platforms (e.g., DV360, The Trade Desk).
Secure B2B Data Integration: Develop and manage secure, automated data-sharing pipelines (SFTP, Cloud Storage Buckets) to seamlessly share information with our external B2B partners.
End-to-End Data Migrations: Drive complex data migration projects by combining advanced Python and SQL. You will own the entire migration lifecycle: analyzing source data, defining the movement logic, conducting rigorous data validation testing, and remapping all downstream dependencies to ensure seamless transitions.
Salesforce & CRM Integrations: Architect and maintain critical, automated data flows between our data warehouse and Salesforce. Using Salesforce as the central hub for P&L reporting, you will ensure the flawless delivery of this data (backend Salesforce/SOQL experience is a strong plus) to the right reports.
Data Validation & Testing: Implement rigorous checks within data pipelines to prevent bad data from reaching final dashboards. You will build tests to verify logical consistency, maintain unique records, and confirm that all information meets the expected standards and quality.




Qualifications




You have:

5-8 years of experience in data analytics, ideally within advertising or a similar industry.
Proven ability to collaborate with Data Engineers and Data Analysts to build infrastructure and translate complex data for non-technical business stakeholders.
Proficiency in writing clean, optimized SQL and Python (Pandas, SciPy, Seaborn) for querying and analyzing large datasets.
A higher education in a quantitative field such as Physics, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering or Mathematics.
Hands-on experience with visualization tools like Tableau, Looker, or PowerBI.
Excellent spoken and written English




Nice to have:

Strong understanding of A/B testing principles and experience designing and analyzing multivariate experiments for digital products.
Knowledge or experience in digital sales or marketplaces
Experience working with CPG/FMCG companies







We believe driven talent deserves:

🌟 An enticing equity plan (dependent on level) that lets you own a piece of the action.
💪 Top-notch private health insurance to keep you at your peak.
🍔 Monthly Glovo credit to satisfy your cravings!
💳 Discounts on transportation, food, and even kindergarten expenses.
🏊 Wellhub membership to keep you energised.
🏖️Flexible time off, the freedom to work from home two days a week, and the opportunity to work from anywhere for up to three weeks a year!
👪 Enhanced parental leave, and office-based nursery.
🧠 Online therapy and wellbeing benefits to ensure your mental well-being.
📚 An external learning budget to fuel your thirst for knowledge and personal growth.




Additional information




At Glovo, your success is defined by both results and behaviors. We hire for excellence in craft and for the Leadership Principles that shape how we think, decide, and collaborate. What you achieve matters and how you achieve it defines us. Together, they move the business forward and deliver great experiences. Learn more about our Leadership Principles here.

Here at Glovo, we thrive on diversity, we believe it enhances our teams, products, and culture. We know that the best ideas come from a mashup of brilliant diverse minds. This is why we are committed to providing equal opportunities to talent from all backgrounds – all genders, racial/diverse backgrounds, abilities, ages, sexual orientations and all other unique characteristics that make you YOU. We will encourage you to bring your authentic self to work, fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels heard.

Feel free to note your pronouns in your application (e.g., she/her/hers, he/him/his, they/them/theirs, etc).




So, ready to take the wheel and make this the ride of your life?




Delve into our culture by taking a peek at our Instagram and check out our LinkedIn and website!

Title: Finance Data Analyst
Description:
As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, what's the next step? Start your journey with us!

We are now looking for a Data Analyst for Finance to join our team in Barcelona (hybrid). The Finance Data Analytics team has been transformative during the last two years by helping our stakeholders succeed in their mission. If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

Join the world's leading travel subscription platform

and one of the largest e-commerce businesses in Europe.


Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands – 7.7M members in Prime since launching in 2017.
More than 100 million searches per day on our websites - more than 6 billion AI daily predictions
Over 1700 employees – More than 60 different nationalities - 99% permanent contracts - 36.3 average age



We're the world’s leading travel subscription platform. We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription program, which has topped over 7.7 million members since launching in 2017. Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalized service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Finance Data Analyst you will be in charge of:


Responsible for execution of key analysis, being the data entry point for the business team and including taking ownership of the different data sources from the business side. Understand the business needs, gather the data and present the key insights: “Contribute to the Finance strategic roadmap with numbers”
Elaborate business cases to support strategic decisions
Create dashboards and tracking: master the internal Business Intelligence tools to contribute to the monitoring and tracking of our business KPIs. Work with data engineering and data science teams to be able to leverage all our internal data
Contribute to the delivery of Finance strategic projects: participate in the delivery of the key internal projects, giving support from the business side to ensure progress and effective delivery of the desired outcomes.



what do you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:


Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative discipline (Mathematics, Statistics, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, etc.),
2-4 years experience in a role with strong analytical component
Strong knowledge of SQL is a requirement,
Python programming skills (mostly for data extraction and data manipulation),
Advanced Office skills. Strong experience with analytical tools, ideally with the Google toolset (spreadsheets, google docs, etc)
Strong analytical skills, fast-learner, with high attention to detail and focused on results and productivity
Business Proficiency in English and fluent in Spanish
A self-starter and team player, who also enjoys having fun!



It would be a plus if you have:


Google Analytics knowledge (as well as Looker Studio),
Previous experience in programming,
Knowledge on data structure and data sets management (as Google Cloud Platform),
SAP knowledge.



Preferred Qualifications


Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.



and what's in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture. Here's what we offer:


A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and the possibility of choosing your equipment and, even better, keeping it for free after 3 years.
Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
Grow opportunities to empower your career, and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcome, not time-in-seat. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, paddle tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.



Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key of our success. Each one of them is unique in their own way and the respect for their uniqueness is and will always be a passion and motivation. Don’t meet every requirement? If you’re excited about this role but you do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.

Apply now!

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
About the role

We are looking for a switched‑on Data Analyst to manage and evolve our reporting pipelines, analytics and automation workflows across European digital transformation unit supporting sales and marketing programs.

This role goes beyond traditional reporting. It combines designing, building, and maintaining end-to-end data pipelines ensuring high‑quality, standardized and scalable reporting for the business.

This role has a strong focus on reporting ownership, automation and data quality, while working closely with business stakeholders and technology teams to ensure data is translated into reliable insight and effective decision‑making.

Apply if

You think you are good match for most of the requirements in the job description.
You are a team player, and you enjoy working in a multicultural team.
You approach business and technical issues with flexibility and rigor.
You are comfortable owning reporting end‑to‑end, including recurring deliverables, data validation, fixing issues, and improving existing dashboards - not just designing new ones.
You like having clear ownership and accountability rather than jumping between loosely defined initiatives.
You are comfortable working close to the business, translating requests into concrete analytical solutions, even when requirements are incomplete at first.
You can work independently, manage priorities, and take responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks.
You see automation, standardization and scalability as core parts of your professional identity, not as side work.
You are curious about experimenting with emerging AI capabilities in analytics environments.


Key responsibilities

Reporting and Analytics foundations

End‑to‑end ownership of reporting frameworks and data pipelines
Enabling consistent, decision‑ready reporting across the European business through automated reporting and ad-hoc analysis.
Ensure a high level of data quality, consistency and reliability across all reports.
Contribute to the continuous improvement of reporting infrastructure and metrics definitions.


Automation and process improvement

Identify opportunities to streamline, automate and optimize analytics and data processes.
Design, execute and continuously improve scalable and automated reporting and analytics solutions.
Define and document data pipelines, dependencies and sources.
Coordinate with IT and Data Platform teams on the implementation of automation and enhancements.
Support sustainable and well‑governed processes rather than ad‑hoc solutions.


Business Partnership & Enablement

Work closely with business stakeholders translate business objectives into clear analytical requirements and reporting specifications.
Support digital transformation initiatives by providing trusted data and analytics foundations.


Reporting & Analysis

Support insight generation related to customer behavior and business performance, in collaboration with advanced analytics or specialist teams where relevant.
Own the end-to-end lifecycle of dashboards and reporting
Perform structured and ad‑hoc analysis to support business questions and priorities.


AI-Enhanced Analytics

ELT mindset and familiar with dbt concepts.

About the role

We are looking for a switched‑on Data Analyst to manage and evolve our reporting pipelines, analytics and automation workflows across European digital transformation unit supporting sales and marketing programs.

This role goes beyond traditional reporting. It combines designing, building, and maintaining end-to-end data pipelines ensuring high‑quality, standardized and scalable reporting for the business.

This role has a strong focus on reporting ownership, automation and data quality, while working closely with business stakeholders and technology teams to ensure data is translated into reliable insight and effective decision‑making.

Apply if
  • You think you are good match for most of the requirements in the job description.
  • You are a team player, and you enjoy working in a multicultural team.
  • You approach business and technical issues with flexibility and rigor.
  • You are comfortable owning reporting end‑to‑end, including recurring deliverables, data validation, fixing issues, and improving existing dashboards - not just designing new ones.
  • You like having clear ownership and accountability rather than jumping between loosely defined initiatives.
  • You are comfortable working close to the business, translating requests into concrete analytical solutions, even when requirements are incomplete at first.
  • You can work independently, manage priorities, and take responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks.
  • You see automation, standardization and scalability as core parts of your professional identity, not as side work.
  • You are curious about experimenting with emerging AI capabilities in analytics environments.

Key responsibilities

Reporting and Analytics foundations
  • End‑to‑end ownership of reporting frameworks and data pipelines
  • Enabling consistent, decision‑ready reporting across the European business through automated reporting and ad-hoc analysis.
  • Ensure a high level of data quality, consistency and reliability across all reports.
  • Contribute to the continuous improvement of reporting infrastructure and metrics definitions.

Automation and process improvement
  • Identify opportunities to streamline, automate and optimize analytics and data processes.
  • Design, execute and continuously improve scalable and automated reporting and analytics solutions.
  • Define and document data pipelines, dependencies and sources.
  • Coordinate with IT and Data Platform teams on the implementation of automation and enhancements.
  • Support sustainable and well‑governed processes rather than ad‑hoc solutions.

Business Partnership & Enablement
  • Work closely with business stakeholders translate business objectives into clear analytical requirements and reporting specifications.
  • Support digital transformation initiatives by providing trusted data and analytics foundations.

Reporting & Analysis
  • Support insight generation related to customer behavior and business performance, in collaboration with advanced analytics or specialist teams where relevant.
  • Own the end-to-end lifecycle of dashboards and reporting
  • Perform structured and ad‑hoc analysis to support business questions and priorities.

AI-Enhanced Analytics
  • Explore opportunities to leverage Generative AI to, automate reporting narratives and insights generation, improve data, accelerate development of data pipelines.

Title: Senior Data Analyst
Description:
Who We Are

Let's have fun shaping your future!

We are Socialpoint, a world-renowned mobile game studio proudly part of the Zynga & Take-Two Interactive family. We’re the creators of hits like Dragon City, Two Dots, Top Troops, and Monster Legends, loved by hundreds of millions of players around the globe.We craft the best social games, bringing joy from Barcelona to the world. Now, we want to bring the world to Barcelona! At Socialpoint, work and play intertwine seamlessly, and we celebrate the diversity that makes us stronger. No matter who you are or where you’re from, you’re welcome here. Join us for a future where making games is as thrilling as playing them!

Position Overview

We are looking to welcome yet another brilliant Senior Marketing Data Analyst into our Marketing Analytics team.

As a Senior Data Analyst, you’ll be responsible for designing and driving high-impact analytics solutions, from developing advanced statistical frameworks to evaluate marketing performance, to building data pipelines that integrate third-party sources, to creating interactive tools that empower partner teams. These are just a few examples of the initiatives you’ll help lead and deliver end-to-end, playing a key role in shaping the technical direction of our analytics efforts. The demands on this team are constantly evolving with the needs of Socialpoint’s and Zynga’s dynamic marketing teams, so it is important that you be able to adapt and utilize your time efficiently.

What You'll Do


Partner closely with marketing and cross-functional teams to identify growth opportunities, improve efficiency, and shape strategic initiatives.
Lead analytical deep dives to surface insights and translate them into actionable recommendations for senior stakeholders.
Visualize and communicate analytical findings clearly, enabling data-driven decision-making across the organization.
Apply statistical methodologies to evaluate performance and account for uncertainties in major initiatives.
Proactively explore and prototype opportunities using AI-driven automation to streamline investigations and improve decision-making.


What You Bring


Demonstrated experience with some or all of the following: predictive modeling, statistics, experimental design, optimization, data visualization
Understanding of marketing metrics and KPIs, with experience in campaign optimization, Lifetime Value (LTV) modeling, and incrementality analysis
Proficiency in SQL and Python with hands-on experience in Redshift, Databricks, PySpark, and Airflow
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate ambiguous questions into data-driven insights
Strong communication skills — you can explain complex data in simple, actionable terms
Familiarity with AI/ML concepts or experience in automating recurring analytics workflows is a plus
A team player, you establish effective relationships to work with others for the win
Proven work experience in data analytics or data science roles
BS in Computer Science, Math, Statistics, Economics, or other quantitative field; Masters, MBA or PhD preferred


What's in it for you as a Socialpointer?


Hybrid working model: we ask you to come to our Barcelona office at least 2 days per week
A generous 25 days of annual leave, plus public holidays
Private medical insurance for you and your family to keep your health bar full
Disability and life insurance
Choose from the latest iOS or Android device when you join (phone or tablet)
Free language lessons in English, Spanish and Catalan
Spotify Premium to add the perfect soundtrack to your adventure
Legendary social events and parties to let off some steam
Take-Two Interactive employee stock purchase plan (eligibility criteria applies)
Professional development budget for skills training


Onsite Perks Include


State of the art gym facilities
Free breakfast, lunch, and specialty coffee
Onsite physiotherapist and hairdresser (no wallet needed!)


The list goes on and on… so get your game on and apply now! Click “Apply” to level up and submit your application in English.

We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer, which means we are committed to creating and celebrating diverse thoughts, cultures, and backgrounds throughout our organization. Employment with us is based on substantive ability, objective qualifications, and work ethic – not an individual’s race, creed, color, religion, sex or gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin or ancestry, alienage or citizenship status, physical or mental disability, pregnancy, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, status as a victim of domestic violence or sex offenses, reproductive health decision, or any other characteristics protected by applicable law.

As an equal opportunity employer, we are committed to providing the necessary support and accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities, health conditions, or impairments (subject to any local qualifying requirements) to ensure their full participation in the job application or interview process. Please contact us at recruitment@socialpoint.es to request any accommodations or for support related to your application for an open position.

Please be aware that Socialpoint does not conduct job interviews or make job offers over third-party messaging apps such as Telegram, WhatsApp, or others. Socialpoint also does not engage in any financial exchanges during the recruitment or onboarding process, and will never ask a candidate for their personal or financial information over an app or other unofficial chat channel. Any attempt to do so may be the result of a scamp or phishing attack, and you should not engage. Socialpoint’s in-house recruitment team will only contact individuals through their official Company email addresses (i.e., via a zynga.com, take2games.com, naturalmotion.com, smallgiantgames.com, themavens.com, gram.gs email domain).

Title: Analytics Engineer (m/w/d)
Place: Sant Cugat del Vallès, Catalonia, Spain
Description:
This is an exciting opportunity to join the Software Center of Excellence of Dematic as an Analytics Engineer. As part of this global team of software experts, you will help develop robust organizational capabilities in sales, design, engineering and support to deliver exceptional software to our customers.

As a specialist, you will own end-to-end implementation of analytics engagements with Dematic customers, while driving the services pipeline as well as be a key voice internally for the further development of the analytics services program. This is both a cross-functional role within the organization as well as a key customer interfacing role. A successful candidate will have demonstrated exceptional performance, innovation, creativity and insight in a similar role.

We offer:


Career Development
Competitive Compensation and Benefits
Global Opportunities



Tasks and Qualifications:

Tasks


Works with customer end-users to define analytics requirements and works with internal team to concept, design and deliver solution
Works independently, within teams, and with multiple types of skillsets (business, data architect, other technical resources)
Performs business process analysis, mapping and design
Ensures high quality delivery of software consulting services and overall client satisfaction
Drives development and documentation of services
Displays depth of knowledge to customers during sales-phase while representing breadth and depth of Dematic solutions and expertise
Supports the sales organization and drive pipeline generation of analytics consulting services



Qualifications
The qualifications for the position of Analytics Engineer include proven success in Client Management, Project Management, and Services Delivery. Other important areas of experience and skills include:


Experience working with data visualization and analytics tools such as Tableau, PowerBI, QlikView, or Superset is required
Experience working with business users to concept, generate and deliver analytics solutions, dashboards and reporting
Proficient experience in Microsoft SQL Server, Oracle, and/or Google BigQuerry
Overall knowledge of MHE technologies and warehouse systems or similar domains is preferred
Specific domain experience and knowledge in the logistics and supply chain industries is a plus
Excellent written and verbal communication skills including presentation skills and knowledge of software tools (MS PowerPoint, MS Visio)
A willingness to travel in order to satisfy client needs, typically less than 5%
Experience conducting requirements analysis, meeting with business stakeholders and applying solutions to customer challenges
Working knowledge of advanced analytic tools such as SAS, R, or Python is required
Working knowledge of cloud-based technologies is preferred
At least 3 years of experience in a related role

Title: Product Data Analyst (PDA)- Híbrido, Barcelona
Description:
¿Te interesaría seguir desarrollándote como Product Data Analyst en una empresa líder en su sector, trabajando en entornos ágiles, multidisciplinares y orientados a la toma de decisiones basada en datos?




Desde Oxigent Technologies seleccionamos un/a Product Data Analyst (PDA) para participar en un proyecto internacional orientado a producto, trabajando junto a equipos de negocio, producto e ingeniería en un entorno ágil y colaborativo, ubicado en Barcelona.




En el caso de ser la persona seleccionada, tu misión será actuar como referente de datos dentro de una squad de producto, impulsando la toma de decisiones basada en datos, el análisis del comportamiento de usuario y la mejora continua del producto mediante experimentación y analítica avanzada.




¿Cuáles serán tus funciones principales?




Actuar como referente de datos para un producto específico, liderando las iniciativas relacionadas con análisis y calidad del dato.
Definir y monitorizar KPIs y métricas de éxito alineadas con los objetivos de negocio y producto.
Diseñar, ejecutar y analizar experimentos de A/B Testing para evaluar nuevas funcionalidades y optimizaciones.
Analizar el comportamiento de usuarios e identificar tendencias, oportunidades de crecimiento y puntos de mejora.
Construir dashboards, informes y visualizaciones para facilitar la toma de decisiones.
Traducir conjuntos de datos complejos en insights accionables y recomendaciones estratégicas.
Garantizar la calidad y consistencia del dato, implementando procesos de validación y mejora continua.
Diseñar y mantener pipelines de datos y flujos ETL que aseguren la fiabilidad de la información.
Fomentar una cultura data-driven dentro de la organización.




Para ello, ¿qué vas a necesitar?




Al menos 3 años de experiencia como Data Analyst o Product Data Analyst.
Nivel de inglés B2 o superior y español fluido.
Experiencia en entornos orientados a producto y negocio.
Conocimientos sólidos de SQL y Python (Pandas y Numpy).
Experiencia con Spark (PySpark o Scala) y tratamiento de grandes volúmenes de datos.
Experiencia en Data Quality, análisis de producto y definición de KPIs.
Experiencia en A/B Testing, experimentación y analítica de producto.
Capacidad para construir dashboards e interpretar datos para generar insights accionables.

Valorable:

Experiencia con Databricks, Snowflake y BigQuery.
Experiencia en entornos Cloud, preferiblemente Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
Conocimientos de herramientas de orquestación como Airflow y DBT.
Experiencia en productos Mobile App y uso de Firebase como herramienta de tracking.




¿Qué te ofrecemos?




Contratación indefinida a través de Oxigent.
Salario acorde a la experiencia aportada (entre 35.000 - 42.000 euros brutos anuales).
Horario flexible y horario intensivo los días viernes.
Modelo híbrido.
Cheque Formación para desarrollarte en las áreas profesionales que más te interesen.
Seguro médico privado.
Retribución flexible aplicable a seguro médico, restaurante, transporte, guardería y formación.
Aplicación de acceso a gimnasios y actividades deportivas en toda España con descuentos.
¡Y muchos otros beneficios!




¡Únete al equipo de Oxigent! Empresa comprometida con la sostenibilidad y la igualdad de oportunidades, donde el talento y la tecnología no entienden de género.

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
About MIGx

MIGx is a global consulting company with an exclusive focus on the healthcare and life science industries, with their particularly demanding requirements on quality and regulatory aspects. We have been managing challenges and solving problems for our clients in the areas of compliance, business processes and many others.




MIGx interdisciplinary teams from Switzerland, Spain and Georgia have been taking care of projects in the fields of M&A, Integration, Application, Data Platforms, Processes, IT management, Digital transformation, Managed services and compliance.




About the profile

We’re looking for a data-driven professional with a passion for turning both structured and unstructured data into meaningful insights. You enjoy exploring data, organizing it into clear models, and bringing it to life through compelling dashboards that deliver real business value.




Project Description

As part of this project, you will develop interactive and insightful dashboards using Tableau and/or Power BI, drawing from multiple, integrated data sources. You will join a cross-functional team at MIGx focused on delivering high-impact Data Services and scalable Data Products for our clients—primarily medium to large enterprises.

This role offers an excellent opportunity to expand your capabilities in the data domain. In addition to working on a key data visualization initiative, you will contribute to implementing modern data architecture principles—guided by best practices such as Data Mesh, Microsoft Fabric, and the Medallion Architecture—to ensure scalability, modularity, and alignment with business goals.




Responsibilities

Build semantic data models to enable efficient reporting and analytics.
Integrate and configure multiple data sources, with a focus on SQL-based systems.
Generate and maintain analytical reports tailored to business requirements.
Perform ad-hoc data analysis to support various business stakeholders.
Collaborate closely with data engineers and analysts to ensure data accuracy, performance, and usability.
Design and develop dashboards using Tableau, Power BI, or similar tools to support data-driven decision-making.

Advanced SQL expertise and solid understanding of relational databases such as MS SQL Server, Oracle, MySQL, or PostgreSQL
SQL knowledge to query, transform, and validate data across complex datasets
Experience in data modeling and designing mapping sheets, including understanding data lineage (source → transformation → consumption)

Familiarity with cloud platforms such as Azure, Google, GCP or AWS

Experience in building ETL pipelines (Extract, Transform, Load)

Title: Supply Chain Data & Analytics Analyst
Description:
Oxford Global Resources is looking for a Data & Analytics Analyst to support the Global Supply Chain organization in one of our Pharmaceutical clients. The role will focus on developing advanced Power BI dashboards, translating business requirements into analytical solutions, and improving reporting standardization across the global supply chain.




Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain Power BI dashboards and reports to monitor key supply chain KPIs such as service level, inventory, forecast accuracy, OTIF, and logistics costs.
Work closely with Supply Chain stakeholders (Planning, Logistics, Customer Experience) to gather and translate business requirements into data and analytics solutions.
Transform business questions into clear analytical frameworks, data models, and visual insights that support decision making.
Contribute to the automation and standardization of reporting and analytics processes across the global supply chain.
Ensure consistency, accuracy, and reliability of supply chain performance reporting.
Extract, validate, and structure supply chain data from ERP systems (M3 preferred).
Collaborate with IT, Finance, and global/regional supply chain teams to improve data availability and reporting capabilities.
Support initiatives related to data governance, KPI standardization, and data quality improvement.




Skills & Qualifications

Bachelor's degree in Business Analytics, Data Science, Industrial Engineering, Information Systems, Business Administration, or a related field.
Experience in Supply Chain, Operations, or Logistics analytics is strongly preferred.




Strong hands-on experience with Power BI, including data modeling, dashboard development, and visualization best practices.
Experience working with ERP systems (M3, Oracle or similar).
Advanced Excel skills.
SQL knowledge is a strong plus.
Experience with Power Platform or reporting automation tools is desirable.
Understanding of supply chain data structures and KPIs is preferred.




Experience

2 years of experience in data analytics, business intelligence, or operations analytics.
Experience working with business stakeholders to gather and translate requirements into analytical solutions.
Exposure to supply chain functions such as planning, logistics, inventory management, or customer operations is an advantage.
Strong analytical and problem-solving capabilities with attention to data quality.

Title: Digital Analyst - (Hybrid)
Description:
As you contemplate your future, you might be asking yourself, " What's the next step?’’ Start your journey with us!

We're seeking an experienced Digital Analyst to join our Analytics & Insights Enabling team in Barcelona (Hybrid) to provide support to all product areas and marketing channels to track performance and user behaviour and run different campaigns, implementing tags needed and configuring. You will be working with Google Analytics and other data sources including web and online marketing data, analyzing results and providing insights and recommendations to improve performance.If you're ready to soar, we're ready to take you there.

Why eDreams ODIGEO

We’re the world's leading travel subscription platform.


We pioneered Prime, the first and largest travel subscription programme, which has topped over 7.8 million Prime members since launching in 2017.
Millions of customers every year across 44 markets – 5 brands: eDreams, GO Voyages, Opodo, Travellink, and the metasearch engine Liligo
More than 100 million searches per day on our websites - more than 6 billion AI daily predictions
Over 1,700 employees – More than 60 different nationalities from all continents – 99% permanent contracts



Prime members are subscribed to global travel, gaining access to a comprehensive multi-product offering for all their travel needs—including hotels, rail, flights, dynamic packages and car rental, among others— compounded by industry-leading flexibility features and exclusive, member-only benefits. This entire Prime experience is powered by a proprietary, industry-leading AI platform that delivers a smarter, hyper-personalised service and comprehensive travel experience globally to its members.

What you will do:

The Role's Key Responsibilities and Tasks

As an eDOer, you will have clear objectives, great challenges and a clear overview of how your work contributes to the global company project and its customers. As a Digital Analyst in the Analytics & Insights Enabling you will be in charge of:


Manage Web & App Analytics tools implementation such as Google Analytics but also others (Specifications, Maintenance and Improvement)
Data validation
Marketing campaigns tags implementation through our Tag Management Systems and Server Tagging solutions
Other tracking codes implementation, personalization, audit and issues solving
Tech documentation and support for tracking and measurement purposes.



What you need to succeed:

Good to have

Bring your unique perspective, speak up, and offer disruptive solutions. You'll have the opportunity to learn and grow while making a real impact on our team. Here's what you need to succeed:


Bachelor degree in Engineering, Mathematics, Statistics or Business
1-3 years of experience in web analytics and app analytics, tracking and data analysis.
Knowledge on Google Analytics and its implementation.
Knowledge on Firebase Analytics and its implementation.
Knowledge on App tracking and analytics
Knowledge in tracking and Tag Management Systems (GTM, Tag Commander).
Javascript knowledge
SQL knowledge
Strong analytical capabilities.
Written and spoken English at an advanced level.
Detail-oriented and resolutive person, self-starter and team player.
Good troubleshooting/problem solving skills.
Passion for data, analysis, online marketing, internet and new technologies.
Good organization and time-management skills with the ability to work on several projects at the same time.
Python and GA data in Big Query analysis knowledge will be a plus
Online Marketing knowledge (main KPIs, how each channel works, etc.) will be a plus



Preferred Qualifications


Experience with Applied AI Tools: Demonstrated comfort using practical AI tools such as Gemini, or other AI-powered assistants.
Experimentation Mindset: Curiosity and eagerness to explore, experiment with, and integrate emerging AI-driven solutions into workflows.
AI-Enhanced Problem Solving: Ability to effectively leverage AI tools to streamline processes, and enhance productivity.
Adaptability and Learning Agility: Enthusiastic about continuously learning and quickly adapting to new AI features and capabilities.



What’s in it for you?

The best talent deserves the best benefits

At eDO, we want you to be a part of our success story and great culture.

Here's what we offer:


A rewarding Compensation package! 💥 Prime Plus membership, competitive salary and benefits package, including flexible benefits, performance-based bonuses, birthday day off, discounts and partnerships, relocation support and premium equipment with role-based selection options and device ownership through our equipment lifecycle program when it reaches its refresh cycle.
Continuous learning to fuel your growth and explore new horizons! 📚 Learn and grow with free Coursera access, soft skills workshops, tech training, leadership development, and more. Plus, enjoy a great onboarding program.
Grow opportunities to empower your career and unleash your potential! 🚀 Personalised career paths and the eVOLVE Program will help you discover, grow, and thrive. Internal mobility opportunities let you pursue horizontal career changes and promotions.
Your Well-being is our priority. Embrace Freedom and Flexibility! 💙 At eDO, we value flexibility, employee care, and transparency. We offer a hybrid home-office model focused on outcomes. You'll be able to find the right work-personal life balance that suits you best.
Work hard, party hard! We believe in having fun and connecting with colleagues! 🎉 Join eDO for after-work events, padel tournaments, parties, and more. Create communities based on your passions, like sports and music. Come to work as you are, with no dress code, and enjoy free fruit, coffee, and tea at our offices.
Enjoy a dynamic and healthy environment! 💫 Be innovative, take risks, and share your ideas. Our diverse and open-minded teams support high performance, learning, and growth. You'll work in an Agile mindset environment with recognition at our core.



Wanna take a peek into what it's like to work at eDO? Follow us on LinkedIn and discover more about life at eDO!

If you are ready for a career opportunity with unmatched benefits, continuous learning, and a supportive work-life balance, look no further! Take your career to new destinations by applying now and help our diverse, inclusive, and passionate team shape the future of travel.

Apply now!

We are an equal-opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status or disability status. Our people are the key to our success. Each one of them is unique in their own way and the respect for their uniqueness is and will always be a passion and motivation. Don’t meet every requirement? If you’re excited about this role but do not feel your experience aligns perfectly with all the requirements we strongly encourage you to apply nevertheless.

Title: Analytics Engineer
Description:
Our Business

team.blue is an ecosystem of successful brands working together across regions to provide customers with everything they need to succeed online. 60+ successful brands make up the group, with a team of more than 3,000 experts serving 3.5 million customers across Europe and beyond.

team.blue’s brands span traditional hosting businesses — offering domain names, email, shared hosting, e-commerce and server solutions — as well as specialist SaaS providers offering compliance, marketing tools and team collaboration products. This broad portfolio makes team.blue a one-stop partner for online businesses and entrepreneurs across Europe.

Position Overview

We are looking for an experienced and autonomous Analytics Engineer to join our AI & Data function. This role sits at the critical intersection between our Data Management team (responsible for ingesting raw data into our Databricks-based data platform) and our Analytics team (responsible for insights and reporting).

You will take raw data, at various stages of conforming, and transform it into trusted, analytics-ready datasets — building KPIs, semantic models, and data products that feed our presentation and reporting layers. Working across a wide variety of data domains (marketing, product usage, customer care, revenue, and more), you will need to be intellectually curious, self-directed, and proactive: comfortable exploring unfamiliar data landscapes with limited guidance, engaging business partners to understand what the data really means, and making sound judgement calls independently.

We need someone we can trust to pick up a new data domain, figure it out, and deliver at pace. Reporting to the Director of Analytics, you will work closely with data engineers, analytics engineers, and business stakeholders across the group.

Where you sit in the team

The Data function is structured around three layers:


Data Management: Ingests raw data from all sources into the Databricks platform. Owns the bronze/raw layer.
Analytics Engineering → YOU: Takes raw data, conforms and transforms it, builds KPI definitions and semantic models, and delivers reliable data products to the presentation layer.
Analytics & Insights: Consumes the analytics-ready data to produce dashboards, reports and strategic insights for the business.



Key responsibilities:

Data Transformation & Modelling


Design and build robust dbt models on Databricks that transform raw, ingested data into clean, conformed, and analytics-ready datasets.
Define and implement KPI logic in collaboration with business and analytics stakeholders, ensuring consistent definitions across domains.
Maintain and evolve the semantic/presentation layer, ensuring data products are reliable, tested, documented, and performant.
Apply software engineering best practices to analytics code: version control, testing, CI/CD, and documentation.



Cross-Domain Data Exploration


Independently onboard new data domains (e.g. marketing attribution, product usage, customer care, subscription data) with limited guidance — exploring the data, understanding its structure and meaning, and deciding how to best model it.
Proactively engage business partners and domain owners to understand context, validate assumptions, and align on KPI definitions.
Identify data quality issues early and work with the Data Management team to resolve them at source.



Collaboration & Enablement


Act as the connective tissue between data engineers and analysts: translating analytical needs into engineering tasks, and surfacing data realities back to the business.
Work with the Analytics team to ensure the presentation layer meets reporting and self-service needs.
Contribute to data governance: naming conventions, lineage documentation, and model cataloguing.
Support the broader team in extending analytics coverage to new brands and domains over time.



Required Experience/skills:


5+ years of experience in analytics engineering, data engineering, or a closely related data role.
Strong, hands-on proficiency with dbt (dbt Core or dbt Cloud) — this is a core requirement.
Experience working on Databricks (or a comparable cloud data platform such as Snowflake or BigQuery).
Solid understanding of dimensional modelling, data vault, or similar data warehousing patterns.
SQL excellence: complex transformations, window functions, query optimisation.
Proven ability to work autonomously across multiple data domains simultaneously, figuring out unfamiliar data with limited documentation.
Strong analytical mindset: able to interrogate data critically, spot anomalies, and validate logic end-to-end.
Excellent communication skills — comfortable talking directly with business stakeholders to elicit requirements and explain data concepts.
Experience working across diverse data domains (e.g. marketing, product analytics, customer care, financial/subscription data).



Nice to Have:


Familiarity with SaaS GTM tooling and metrics — e.g. Amplitude, HubSpot, or similar marketing and product analytics platforms.
Experience with Python for data transformation or pipeline orchestration.
Exposure to BI/visualisation layers (e.g. Looker, Tableau, Power BI) and how they consume semantic models.
Experience in a multi-brand or portfolio company context.
Background in a consulting or contractor capacity: comfortable delivering impact quickly in complex environments.



Right to Work

At any stage, please be prepared to provide proof of eligibility to work in the

country you’re applying for. Unfortunately, we are unable to support relocation

packages or sponsorship visas

"Come as you are"

Everyone is welcome here. Diversity & Inclusion are at our core. Far above any technical competence, we value respect, openness, and trusted collaboration. We do not tolerate intolerance.

ESG

"At team.blue, our commitment to caring for the environment and each other is at the heart of everything we do. Our latest impact report showcases our ongoing ESG efforts and ambitious sustainability goals. Interested in learning more about our dedication to making a positive impact? Check it out here.”

The most trusted digital enabler

team.blue is a leading digital enabler for companies and entrepreneurs. It serves over 3.3 million customers in Europe and has more than 3,000 experts to support them. Its goal is to shape technology and to empower businesses with innovative digital services.

Click here to read more about team.blue

Title: Business Data Analyst
Description:
About The Role

We are looking for a switched‑on Data Analyst to manage and evolve our reporting pipelines, analytics and automation workflows across European digital transformation unit supporting sales and marketing programs.

This role goes beyond traditional reporting. It combines designing, building, and maintaining end-to-end data pipelines ensuring high‑quality, standardized and scalable reporting for the business.

This role has a strong focus on reporting ownership, automation and data quality, while working closely with business stakeholders and technology teams to ensure data is translated into reliable insight and effective decision‑making.

Apply if


You think you are good match for most of the requirements in the job description.
You are a team player, and you enjoy working in a multicultural team.
You approach business and technical issues with flexibility and rigor.
You are comfortable owning reporting end‑to‑end, including recurring deliverables, data validation, fixing issues, and improving existing dashboards - not just designing new ones.
You like having clear ownership and accountability rather than jumping between loosely defined initiatives.
You are comfortable working close to the business, translating requests into concrete analytical solutions, even when requirements are incomplete at first.
You can work independently, manage priorities, and take responsibility for outcomes, not just tasks.
You see automation, standardization and scalability as core parts of your professional identity, not as side work.
You are curious about experimenting with emerging AI capabilities in analytics environments.


Key Responsibilities

Reporting and Analytics foundations


End‑to‑end ownership of reporting frameworks and data pipelines
Enabling consistent, decision‑ready reporting across the European business through automated reporting and ad-hoc analysis.
Ensure a high level of data quality, consistency and reliability across all reports.
Contribute to the continuous improvement of reporting infrastructure and metrics definitions.


Automation and process improvement


Identify opportunities to streamline, automate and optimize analytics and data processes.
Design, execute and continuously improve scalable and automated reporting and analytics solutions.
Define and document data pipelines, dependencies and sources.
Coordinate with IT and Data Platform teams on the implementation of automation and enhancements.
Support sustainable and well‑governed processes rather than ad‑hoc solutions.


Business Partnership & Enablement


Work closely with business stakeholders translate business objectives into clear analytical requirements and reporting specifications.
Support digital transformation initiatives by providing trusted data and analytics foundations.


Reporting & Analysis


Support insight generation related to customer behavior and business performance, in collaboration with advanced analytics or specialist teams where relevant.
Own the end-to-end lifecycle of dashboards and reporting
Perform structured and ad‑hoc analysis to support business questions and priorities.


AI-Enhanced Analytics


Explore opportunities to leverage Generative AI to, automate reporting narratives and insights generation, improve data, accelerate development of data pipelines.


Required Experience

Experience, skills & profile


Proven experience in a Business Data Analyst, BI Analyst or Analytics role.
Proven ability to collaborate with Data Engineers and Data Analysts to build infrastructure.
ELT mindset and familiar with dbt concepts.
Comfortable with Python for data processing, scripting and automation.
Experience working with Cloud Data Warehouse (ideally Snowflake)
Advanced SQL skills (Data modeling basics, complex joins and transformations, query optimization)
Hands‑on experience creating and maintaining reports and dashboards using Power BI and DAX.


Personal attributes


Comfortable owning analytics deliverables end‑to‑end.
Able to drive clarity in ambiguous situations.
Comfortable working in a multicultural, cross‑functional environment as a team player
Professional written and spoken English is required.
EU citizenship or valid work permit required.


Working Conditions


Hybrid work model: 2 days in the office and 3 days remote per week.


Key Skills

Accountability, Collaboration, Data Analysis, Data Pipelines, Data Processing, Process Improvements, Report Analysis, Report Automation

At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.

What's In It For You?


Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
Elevate Your Personal Well-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
Diversity, Equity & Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.

At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!

Title: Lead Data Analyst
Description:
Madbox is a fast-growing mobile gaming company with a very unique way of developing games. Everything has been made for teams to take as much ownership as possible, unleash their creativity, bring performance, and have as much fun as possible.

In July 2022, we launched our Pocket Champs game worldwide which quickly became one of the top-grossing games in its category. In our fast-paced, tech-driven environment, we continuously innovate by developing and updating our proprietary modules, along with integrating third-party ones, to enhance game functionalities, ensure precise analytics, and comply with evolving regulations.

This dynamic ecosystem requires meticulous coordination to keep our games at the forefront of technology and user experience.

Our Analytics team covers the full spectrum: a live game generating real revenue, several titles in active development, and a Data Core team building the infrastructure that powers everything. You won't be working in a silo, you'll be joining a connected team where what you build on Pocket Champs shapes how we think about analytics across the whole company.

As Lead Data Analyst on Pocket Champs, you will be the senior analytical voice on our core game, defining what healthy looks like, challenging investment decisions with data, and setting the standard for how the analytics team thinks and operates. This role sits at the intersection of the game team: designers, PMs, and Live Ops, and the full technical backbone of Madbox: Data Core, Central Game Tech building cross-game functionalities, Web Tech developing new tools, and an AI team making everything smarter. You'll coordinate across all of them.

Your future responsibilities and scope:


Shape the Game Strategy: Be the central analytics voice on Pocket Champs, define what healthy looks like, challenge investment decisions with data, and set the analytical direction for the game
Lead the Analytics Standard: Elevate the bar for the team, set methodology standards, challenge analytical approaches, and mentor analysts on quality, rigor, and communication
Own Experimentation: Own the A/B test framework end to end: design, evaluation methodology, and standards for how results are interpreted and acted on
Design Data Access: Translate business questions into data model requirements and coordinate with the Data Core team to build the layers that power analytical work across the game
Drive Product Insights: Proactively surface insights for the product team, not just answering questions, but identifying what questions should be asked
Define Communication & Process: Set and own the standards for how analytical findings reach designers, PMs, and Live Ops: format, cadence, and whether it actually influenced decisions


The profile we are looking for:


5+ years in mobile gaming analytics, worked on live games across the full release cycle, with direct experience in retention and monetization mechanics influencing outcomes
Strong statistical foundations: designed and evaluated A/B tests end to end, and knows what to do when conditions aren't clean
Track record of building KPI frameworks from first principles, defining what matters for the specific game and context rather than defaulting to industry convention
Evidence-first: forms strong positions from data, defends them under pressure, but stays open to changing course when the evidence calls for it, the goal is to be correct, not just right.
Able to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for both technical and non-technical audiences
Expert proficiency in SQL and either R or Python for data exploration and analysis
High autonomy, low maintenance: figures things out quickly, meticulous about what matters, moves with pragmatism and proactivity


Nice to have:


Experience scaling games on revenue across different game types
Familiarity with Bayesian methods
Experience designing data models and metric layers, not just consuming dashboards and the ability to communicate those designs clearly to a technical data team
Experience defining and evaluating how analytical findings reach non-technical stakeholders setting standards for format, depth, and cadence
Experience working with Looker & LookML


At Madbox, we value the mindset and how you can fit with our culture by sharing common values and creating great games together.

We are passionate, always pushing to the next level to learn new things. We are creative and innovative and most of all, team players 🙏

Please note: unfortunately, this position is not open to relocation and we cannot offer visa sponsorship.

Do you recognize yourself in this mindset? Apply today and come meet us !!! ⬇️

How do we hire at Madbox?


Meet the recruiter
Meet the direct manager
Home Assignment
Home Assignment Interview Review
Meet the stakeholders
Meet the team
Meet with Leadership


NB: our offers are extended within 24h

Find out more about Madbox!

Title: Growth Data Scientist
Description:
## Growth Data ScientistApplyremote type: Hybridlocations: Barcelona, Spaintime type: Full timeposted on: Posted Todayjob requisition id: R***********Job Title: Data Scientist********Location: Barcelona (3 days per week in the office)********Department: Data and Technology********Reports To: Data Scientist, Growth****Join Aristocrat as a Growth Data Scientist and help us build world-class mobile gaming experiences!

This role offers an outstanding opportunity to be at the forefront of driving player acquisition strategies using innovative data science techniques.

At Aristocrat, we foster an inclusive and collaborative culture, where innovation and excellence are celebrated.

You will play a pivotal role in advising our Growth team on budget allocation and channel efficiency, ultimately crafting the future of our hit games.

## What You'll Do* Counsel the UA team regarding budget planning and channel tactics based on comprehensive data analysis and modelling.


Apply statistical analysis, causal inference, machine learning, and time-series modelling to understand user behavior and assess marketing channel efficiency.
Proactively identify areas of improvement; build and run analyses and models that lead to actionable recommendations.
Build and maintain forecasting models to support UA planning and decision-making.
Translate complex analytical findings into clear, compelling insights for both technical and non-technical collaborators.
Collaborate with Data Analytics and Engineering teams to ensure reliable data foundations and feature availability.
Learn from and share ideas with a diverse, globally distributed team of data scientists.


## What We're Looking For* Degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, or a similar quantitative field, or equivalent experience.


2+ years of professional data science experience, with a proven track record of delivering end-to-end data or ML projects.
Practical experience applying data science to address real business challenges, ideally in a marketing, growth, or digital environment.
Experience in gaming or digital entertainment is a strong plus.
Proficiency in Python and SQL.
Experience building forecasting and time-series models.
Familiarity with causal inference methods (e.G. diff-in-diff, regression discontinuity, uplift modelling).
Knowledge of statistical analysis and experimentation (A/B testing, significance testing).
Experience with data visualization tools and presenting analytical results clearly.
Pragmatic approach to problem-solving, favoring practical solutions.
Comfortable working with ambiguity and switching context as business priorities evolve.
Curious and proactive, with a deep understanding of problems before jumping to solutions.
Collaborative, with excellent collaborator management skills.If you're passionate about using data science to build outstanding gaming experiences and are ready to lead data products to success, we want to hear from you.


Join Aristocrat and help develop the future of mobile gaming!

Title: Data Analyst – Power BI
Place: Sant Cugat del Vallès, Catalonia, Spain
Description:
En BETWEEN Technology, buscamos un/a Data Analyst para unirse a nuestro equipo en Sant Cugat . Buscamos un/a Analista de Datos con al menos 2-3 años de experiencia en herramientas de análisis y visualización como Excel, Power BI, Power Query, DAX, y conocimientos en Python.

Esta posición contribuye al desarrollo de informes y análisis de datos, principalmente mediante Power BI, proporcionando soporte al equipo de Reporting. Su labor será asegurar la disponibilidad, trazabilidad y calidad de la información.

Responsabilidades Principales


Análisis de datos: Recopilar, transformar y analizar datos provenientes de diversas fuentes utilizando Excel, Power BI y Power Query, con el objetivo de generar informes para el negocio.
Modelado de datos: Diseñar y mantener modelos de datos robustos mediante DAX, que permitan realizar análisis complejos y cálculos personalizados adaptados a las necesidades de cada área.
Desarrollo de informes: Crear dashboards e informes interactivos en Power BI que faciliten la visualización clara y efectiva de los resultados, orientados a distintos niveles de la organización.
Automatización de procesos: Utilizar Python para procesamiento de datos, mejorando la eficiencia operativa y reducir errores manuales.
Cierres mensuales y reporting corporativo: Participar activamente en los cierres mensuales, asegurando la correcta consolidación de datos y elaboración de reportes que se remiten a las oficinas de Corporate, cumpliendo con los estándares de calidad y plazos establecidos.


Requisitos


Mínimo 2-3 años de experiencia en análisis y manipulación de datos con Excel.
Experiencia demostrable en el desarrollo de informes interactivos con Power BI, DAX para modelado de datos.
Experiencia en procesos de cierre mensual y reporting corporativo.
Conocimientos en Python.
Capacidad para comunicar resultados de forma clara y efectiva.
Autonomía en el trabajo y capacidad para colaborar en equipos multidisciplinares.


Requisitos valorables


Conocimiento de bases de datos: SQL, Fabrik…

Title: Data Analyst
Description:
Descripción oferta

Desde la Dirección de NEGOCIO, precisamos incorporar un/a DATA ANALYST en ANÁLISIS DE NEGOCIO, ubicado en BARCELONA.

Su misión será facilitar a los equipos de Negocio información de valor sobre la evolución del negocio y los clientes de VidaCaixa, facilitando la obtención de insights y conclusiones a partir de la explotación analítica de datos. La persona que se incorpore combinará el conocimiento de técnicas y herramientas de explotación de datos con fuertes capacidades analíticas y conocimiento de negocio.

¿Cuál será tu propósito dentro de VidaCaixa?


Desarrollo y divulgación de análisis e informes que permitan comprender la evolución del negocio y faciliten la obtención de insights.
Análisis en profundidad que faciliten la toma de decisiones y acompañen la estrategia de negocio: evolución de las ventas y las cancelaciones por producto, impacto de campañas, lanzamiento de nuevos productos, simuladores y creación de escenarios, valoración de oportunidades y potencial de negocio, …
Incorporación de la visión cliente que permita entender las necesidades y comportamientos de los clientes a partir la analítica avanzada de datos.
Desarrollo de cuadros de mando (QlikSense) y procesos automatizados que permitan innovar y optimizar la explotación y acceso transversal a los datos.
Innovación y mejora continua en las formas de explotar y visualizar la información, explorando el potencial de nuevas herramientas y la IA.
Trabajar juntamente con los equipos de negocio para la identificación de nuevas oportunidades a partir de los datos.
Conocimiento de las bases de datos y el sistema informacional a partir del que se explotan los datos de clientes.



Requisitos:

Eres el talento que estamos buscando si cuentas con…


Formación universitaria superior (Matemáticas, Estadística, Ingeniería, Informática, Física…) o cualquier formación con foco en especialidad analítica.
Nivel avanzado en programación SQL para el análisis y transformación de bases de datos.
Experiencia previa como Data Analyst o analista de Business Intelligence: análisis de perfil de clientes, seguimientos de negocio, definición de indicadores, etc.
Eres una persona con iniciativa, organizada y orientada a resultados.
Cuentas con capacidad analítica para la extracción, comunicación y presentación de conclusiones a los responsables de negocio a partir de los datos.
Facilidad para trabajar en equipo y en proyectos con equipos transversales.
Curiosidad, predisposición a la innovación, aprendizaje y mejora continua.
Se valorará de forma positiva experiencia en herramientas de diseño de cuadros de mando y visualización de datos (QlikSense, PowerBI, Tableau).
Se valorará de forma positiva experiencia previa en el sector bancario o asegurador.



Beneficios

Sabemos que harás un gran trabajo, por eso hemos pensado en estos beneficios para ti…


Contrato indefinido
Flexibilidad horaria de entrada (7:30 a 9:30) y en la comida (puedes emplear entre un mínimo de 45 minutos y un máximo de 2 horas) para que puedas autogestionar tu tiempo
Plan de acogida y seguimiento de tu desarrollo profesional, con evaluaciones 360 y planes de desarrollo individuales.
Acceso a una plataforma online de formación, con un amplio catálogo autoformativo, para que tu aprendizaje sea continuo.
Todos los viernes con jornada intensiva para que puedas disfrutar más del fin de semana.
Del 15 de junio al 15 de septiembre jornada intensiva TODOS los días, porque sabemos que es verano y quieres disfrutar más tiempo de las horas de sol
Modelo de trabajo híbrido. Porque creemos que pasar tiempo en la oficina es un factor clave para desarrollar la creatividad, y disfrutar en equipo.
Fruta, porque es importante cuidarse. ¡Mens sana, in corpore sano!
29 días hábiles de vacaciones. ¡Desconectar, para volver a conectar!
Plan de Beneficios: plan de pensiones, seguro de salud, seguro de vida, ticket restaurante
Retribución flexible aplicado a guardería y/o transporte.



Proceso

¿Cómo será el proceso de selección?


Recibimos y validamos tu solicitud
Evaluación telefónica con especialista de selección
Realización de informe
Entrevista con el/la responsable de departamento
Entrevista personal con HRBP
¡Y no lo olvides, te daremos feedback!

Title: Growth Data Scientist
Description:
Únete a Aristocrat como Growth Data Scientist y ayúdanos a crear experiencias de juegos móviles de primera clase. Este puesto ofrece una excelente oportunidad para estar a la vanguardia en la implementación de estrategias de adquisición de jugadores utilizando técnicas innovadoras de ciencia de datos. En Aristocrat, fomentamos una cultura inclusiva y colaborativa, donde la innovación y la excelencia son celebradas. Jugarás un papel crucial asesorando a nuestro equipo de Growth sobre la asignación de presupuestos y la eficiencia de los canales, moldeando el futuro de nuestros juegos exitosos.

Lo que harás
Asesorarás al equipo de UA en la planificación del presupuesto y tácticas de canales basándote en análisis de datos completos y modelado.
Aplicarás análisis estadísticos, inferencia causal, aprendizaje automático y modelado de series temporales para entender el comportamiento de los usuarios y evaluar la eficiencia de los canales de marketing.
Identificarás proactivamente áreas de mejora; construirás y ejecutarás análisis y modelos que conduzcan a recomendaciones accionables.
Construirás y mantendrás modelos de previsión para apoyar la planificación y toma de decisiones de UA.
Traducirás hallazgos analíticos complejos en ideas claras y convincentes para colaboradores técnicos y no técnicos.
Colaborarás con los equipos de Análisis de Datos e Ingeniería para asegurar una base de datos fiable y disponibilidad de características.
Aprenderás y compartirás ideas con un equipo diverso y distribuido globalmente de científicos de datos.


Lo que buscamos
Grado en Matemáticas, Estadística, Economía, Informática o un campo cuantitativo similar, o experiencia equivalente.
Más de 2 años de experiencia profesional en ciencia de datos, con un historial demostrado de entrega de proyectos de datos o ML de principio a fin.
Experiencia práctica aplicando ciencia de datos para resolver desafíos empresariales reales, idealmente en un entorno de marketing, crecimiento o digital.
Experiencia en juegos o entretenimiento digital es una ventaja importante.
Dominio de Python y SQL.
Experiencia construyendo modelos de previsión y de series temporales.
Familiaridad con métodos de inferencia causal (por ejemplo, diff-in-diff, discontinuidad de regresión, modelado de uplift).
Conocimiento de análisis estadístico y experimentación (pruebas A/B, pruebas de significancia).
Experiencia con herramientas de visualización de datos y presentación clara de resultados analíticos.
Enfoque pragmático para la resolución de problemas, favoreciendo soluciones prácticas.
Comodidad trabajando con ambigüedad y cambiando de contexto a medida que evolucionan las prioridades empresariales.
Curiosidad y proactividad, con una comprensión profunda de los problemas antes de saltar a las soluciones.
Colaborativo/a, con excelentes habilidades de gestión de colaboradores.


Si te apasiona usar la ciencia de datos para crear experiencias de juegos excepcionales y estás listo/a para liderar productos de datos hacia el éxito, queremos saber de ti. Únete a Aristocrat y ayuda a desarrollar el futuro de los juegos móviles.

¿Por qué Product Madness?

Como parte de la familia Aristocrat, compartimos su misión de llenar de alegría la vida gracias al poder del juego, con un equipo de primer nivel que crea títulos líderes y de mayor recaudación en el género de casino social, entre ellos Heart of Vegas, Lightning Link y Cashman Casino.

Con un equipo global de 800 personas, Product Madness tiene su sede en Londres, y oficinas en Barcelona, Gdańsk, Lviv, Montreal y un equipo remoto en Estados Unidos, lo que nos convierte en una auténtica potencia global.

Nos guiamos por nuestro principio de “Las personas primero”. Independientemente de dónde, cuándo o cómo trabajen, los miembros de nuestro equipo tienen oportunidades para avanzar en su carrera profesional y crecer con nosotros. Nos enorgullece fomentar una cultura inclusiva, en la que se anima a cada persona a dar lo mejor de sí misma cada día.

Pero no confíes solo en nuestra palabra. En 2024, fuimos incluidos en la lista de los Global Inspiring Workplace Awards y recibimos un premio de bronce en los Stevies for Great Employers, en la categoría de “Empleador del año - Medios de comunicación y entretenimiento”.

Disponibilidad para viajar

Ninguna

Información adicional

En este momento, no podemos tramitar visados de trabajo para este puesto. Los candidatos deben tener permiso para trabajar a tiempo completo en el país donde se ofrece la vacante, sin necesidad de visado ahora ni en el futuro.
